VWAP SCALPING CHECKLIST
Use this before every setup. No sweep, no structure, no trade.
01 CONTEXT
Mark the session and time window first: NY open, London overlap, or your chosen BTC execution block.
Decide whether price is trending above or below VWAP, or stretching away from fair value.
02 SETUP
Wait for price to interact with VWAP or a deviation band.
Identify the liquidity sweep: previous high, low, equal highs, or equal lows must be taken.
Do not enter on touch alone. Let the market prove reaction.
03 CONFIRMATION
Require a 5-minute displacement close back through the reaction point.
Body should be strong, not just wick rejection.
Volume should expand versus nearby candles.
04 EXECUTION
Entry after confirmation candle or controlled retest.
Stop goes beyond the invalidation swing, not randomly under VWAP.
Target 1 = VWAP. Target 2 = opposite band or prior structure.
Rule: VWAP is your fairness line. Bands show stretch. Price action gives permission.

FIBONACCI RETRACEMENT CHECKLIST
Draw clean, trade clean. Use the swing that actually controls the move.
01 DRAW IT RIGHT
Identify a clear impulse leg first.
In an uptrend, draw from swing low to swing high. In a downtrend, draw from swing high to swing low.
Keep the anchor points obvious enough that another trader would choose the same leg.
02 FOCUS LEVELS
Watch 38.2%, 50%, and 61.8% first.
Treat 50% as a working retracement zone even though it is not a Fibonacci ratio.
Deeper pullbacks need stronger confirmation.
03 CONFLUENCE
Check whether the Fib zone lines up with prior support or resistance.
Look for confluence with a moving average, session level, or candle reaction.
Do not use Fib in isolation.
04 EXECUTION
Wait for rejection or displacement from the level.
Stop goes beyond the swing or beyond the invalidation level.
Targets can be prior highs or lows, or Fib extensions such as 127.2% or 161.8%.
Rule: Fibonacci gives location. Structure and confirmation decide the trade.

VWAP + FIBONACCI CONFLUENCE
This is the premium setup: fair value, retracement level, and market reaction all lining up together.
01 FIND THE OVERLAP
Start with one clean trade example.
Apply VWAP and deviation bands first.
Apply Fibonacci on the same impulse leg and mark where Fib levels overlap VWAP or a band.
02 BUILD THE STORY
Ask: is price stretched from value and pulling into a key retracement?
Best setups happen when VWAP, Fib, and prior structure all cluster in one zone.
This creates a high-attention area, not an automatic entry.
03 TRIGGER
Wait for liquidity sweep inside or just beyond the confluence zone.
Require displacement close and momentum shift.
Use lower timeframe only for refinement, not to force a trade.
04 MANAGE
Entry on reclaim or retest of the confluence zone.
Stop beyond the confluence failure point.
Scale at VWAP, prior structure, or extension targets.
Rule: Confluence narrows the battlefield. Confirmation wins the battle.

WHY IT WORKS
📍

Structure first

Every entry requires a liquidity sweep, VWAP confirmation, regime alignment, and 5M displacement close. No sweep — no trade. No exceptions.

⏱

Session-based timing

Developed on BTC session phases — but the Trap/Execute rhythm applies to any market with a defined open. Timing is the edge, not prediction.

📊

Confirmation-first

Price must close beyond the sweep with body >60% of range and volume expansion. Structure is structure — this rule holds on BTC, futures, forex, or equities.

THE SYSTEM
⚡

Trap-anchored VWAP

Sigma bands at ±2σ and ±3σ. Mean reversion and value break modes. Anchored to the trap candle — not the session open.

🎯

Six-step execution

Time window. Liquidity sweep. VWAP rule. Regime bias. News fuel. 5M displacement close. All six required. No exceptions.

📊

Regime + polarity

BUY CORE or SELL RESET governs every trade. Currency meter and polarity engine score conviction before entry is even considered.

SYSTEM IN ACTION
− = BUY CORE  ·  + = SELL RESET  ·  sign may invert vs USD anchor

SYSTEM PRINCIPLES
The 6 core laws. Follow @BiG.ENGiN3 · DM SAUCE for your free code.
FREE

WICKS LIE · CLOSES CONFIRM

The body is truth. The wick is noise. Only 5M closes give permission to enter.

REGIME = DIRECTION

Every trade starts with orientation. BUY CORE or SELL RESET governs all signal reads.

LIQUIDITY = LOCATION

No sweep = no trade. Non-negotiable. The market must take a high or low first.

VWAP DEFINES WHERE

Mean anchor. Value reversion origin. Trap-anchored, reanchors at recalibration.

TRAP DEFINES WHEN

Time is the edge. Rhythm is the trigger. Trap fires at :30. Execute fires at :00.

CLOSE = PERMISSION

5M body close beyond sweep. >60% of candle range. Volume expansion. All three required.

WE DON'T PREDICT. WE EXECUTE.
